caption: In the video, a person is seen holding a spool of glittery ribbon with their left hand while unrolling it with their right hand. The background features an open catalog titled "Feels Like Frost Suite," which showcases various winter-themed craft supplies and designs. The person appears to be demonstrating or discussing the ribbon, possibly as part of a crafting tutorial or product review. The catalog includes images of cards, decorations, and other items that can be created using the featured products. The person's hands are carefully handling the ribbon, suggesting they are explaining its texture, length, or potential uses in crafting projects.
